stimulus:
Here is a demo trial! Like what you will do in the main experiment,

you will watch a movie clip and at the same time marking off the activity in these movies into the SMALLEST units that seem natural and meaningful to you.

Remember, tap the SPACE BAR to mark off a boundary between two SMALL units of activity.

A green bar will appear at the bottom of the screen when you press the button.

stimulus:
Great! Hopefully you got an idea of what a meaningful unit is.
Remember that there is no right or wrong answer.
We just want to know if there are certain subunits of the video that you think are natural and meaningful.


Now the main experiment starts.
You will watch multiples videos depicting everyday activities.
For each clip, while watching, remember to mark off boundaries between two SMALL units of activity by pressing the SPACE bar.
Please pay full attention while watching. You might be tested on what happened in each clip in details later.
